description: Style NoteCasual weekends call for an injection of easy-going attitude, which is exactly what this pair of shorts from indian terrain offers. In a checked pattern, these shorts offer a typically refined way to step out in style. Pair this lightweight pair with a fitting tee for a dapper look at impromptu gatheringsProduct DetailsGrey and white checked shorts that has two insert pockets on the sides, a small coin pocket on the right, two welt pockets below the waistband at the back with buttoned closures, broad and comfortable waistband with loops, brand badge above the right welt pocket at the back with a zipped and buttoned closure on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wring Tumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:6' and waist: 32") is wearing a size 32
